pulse: The Technology sector currently trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 16.4x and a P/E of 24.4x, reflecting a premium compared to the broader market which generally has lower multiples. Notably, Nvidia (NVDA) reported a staggering revenue growth of 73.2%, although its high P/E of 37.4x raises concerns following the mixed sentiment around AI stocks as the broader tech rally appears to be stalling, as indicated by recent headlines. Going forward, investors should monitor earnings from key players like TSMC, which saw a 37% revenue increase in January due to ongoing AI demand, as this could signal whether the sector can overcome current valuation pressures and maintain growth momentum.
